name: C_math3d_script
description: Dump mode exposes quaternion, transform-stack, and xform matrix intermediate state for the integrated script.

test.command: [[result=0,stdout="^[\s\S]*COMMAND: quat.rotate_axis_angle[\s\S]*QUAT:[\s\S]*vec3 -2.000 1.000 3.000[\s\S]*COMMAND: transform.compose_apply[\s\S]*MATRIX row0=[\s\S]*vec3 6.000 0.000 11.000[\s\S]*scalar 97.000[\s\S]*COMMAND: xform.apply_point[\s\S]*MATRIX row0=[\s\S]*vec3 6.000 23.000 42.000[\s\S]*COMMAND: xform.apply_vector[\s\S]*MATRIX row0=[\s\S]*vec3 -4.000 3.000 12.000[\s\S]*COMMAND: xform.mul[\s\S]*xform 0.000 -2.000 0.000 1.000[\s\S]*COMMAND: xform.inverse[\s\S]*xform 0.000 0.500 0.000 -1.000[\s\S]*$"]]--dump --script scene.m3d

io_hint: Dump parsed commands plus real quaternion/matrix intermediate values; xform apply, multiply, and inverse results must still be computed from the script.
